name: Maple Syrup Broilers
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons Maple syrup (1 tablespoon per piece of chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter 2 very tender young broiler chickens.
2. Roll each piece in flour seasoned with salt and pepper.
3. Brown the chicken pieces in 4 tablespoons butter.
4. Place the browned chicken pieces in an attractive ovenproof earthenware casserole.
5. Add the thinly sliced onions to the pan, brown them, and pour over the chicken.
6. Sprinkle with a pinch of aniseed and savory.
7. Pour 1 tablespoon maple syrup over each piece of chicken.
8. Deglaze the frying pan with 1/2 cup cider or water and pour over the chicken.
9. Bake for 40 minutes, uncovered, in a 350°F oven.
